title: GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Jaipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group:
GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
